dashboard.login_title: Sign in to see your gifts
dashboard.confirm_delete_received: Remove this gift from the list?

Dear {name},

I wanted to tell you…

create.occasion_applied: ✓ Preset applied — you can still tweak it
create.login_title: Sign in to create a gift

gift.preview_mode_banner: Sender preview — this open won't be counted

gift.create_free_account: Create your free account and start sending unforgettable digital gifts.
gift.thank_with_gift_desc: Open the creator with the recipient already filled in — ten seconds and it's sent.

reaction_builder.sent_desc: Your message has been delivered to the sender.
reaction_builder.text_placeholder: Thank you so much! I was speechless when I opened the gift…
reaction_builder.gift_desc: You'll create a new gift to send back.
reaction_builder.respond_desc: Choose how you want to react.

reactions.title: Received reactions 💌
reactions.none_subtitle: When someone responds to your gift, the reaction will appear here.

login_prompt.title: Create your account
login_prompt.description: Sign in to manage your gifts, see who opened them and reactions received.

share.share_title: A gift for you on BeGift
share.whatsapp_text:
I have a gift for you! 🎁
{url}
share.whatsapp_notify:
Hey {name}! I have a gift for you on BeGift 🎁

app.name: BeGift
app.tagline: Digital gifts that feel like magic

home.hero_subtitle: A message, a song, two concert tickets — wrap them in a digital package that opens with magic. For a special occasion, or just to say:
home.install_banner_subtitle: Add it to your home screen
home.feature1_desc: Paper, ribbon, bow, animation and sound.
home.feature2_desc: From click to link in less than a minute.
home.feature3_desc: No app needed for the recipient.
home.step1_desc: A photo, a video, a song, a letter. Even a PDF or a link to a card. It's up to you.
home.step2_desc: Colors, ribbon, bow, opening animation and sound. Use a template if you're in a hurry.
home.step3_desc: Share it however you like — WhatsApp, iMessage, Telegram, email. They open it, get emotional, reply.
home.examples_subtitle: Pick a template and you're halfway there.
home.social_proof_title: Built for people who really care
home.social_proof_desc: BeGift exists to make a moment special — not to impress. No ads, no trackers, no spam. Just your gift and the joy of whoever opens it.
home.final_cta_desc: The first gift is free. Just 60 seconds.

ai_helper.intro: We'll generate 3 message suggestions for {name}. Pick the tone and — optionally — give us some context.
ai_helper.done_intro: 3 proposals generated for {name}. Tap the one you prefer — you can edit it after.
ai_helper.context_label: Context or what the gift contains
ai_helper.context_placeholder: E.g. vacation photos, song that reminds us of our first date, etc.
ai_helper.err_not_authenticated: Sign in to use the AI assistant.
ai_helper.err_rate_limited: Too many requests — try again in a few minutes.
ai_helper.err_ai_unavailable: The AI assistant is temporarily offline. Try again soon.
ai_helper.err_parse_failed: The proposals didn't arrive in the correct format, please retry.

push_card.title: Turn on notifications
push_card.desc: Get notified when someone sends you a gift, even when the app is closed — just like WhatsApp.
push_card.err_denied: Permission denied. You can enable it in your browser settings.
push_card.err_save_failed: Save failed. Please try again later.

ios_install.title: Install BeGift on your Home Screen
ios_install.desc: Tap {icon} at the bottom of your browser, then {addCta} to have BeGift like an app and receive notifications when a gift arrives.

username_onboarding.title: Choose your username
username_onboarding.desc_before_code: This is how others will identify you on BeGift. Only lowercase letters, numbers and
username_onboarding.err_taken: This name was just taken. Try another.
username_onboarding.change_later: You can change it anytime from your profile settings.
username_onboarding.val_reserved: This name is reserved, pick another

settings_profile.title: Your profile
settings_profile.desc_before_code: Your username is how others identify you on BeGift. Only lowercase letters, numbers and
settings_profile.err_taken: This name was taken. Try another.
settings_profile.change_warning_before: ⚠️ If you change your username, people who knew you as
settings_profile.change_warning_after: won't find you with that name anymore.

survey.intro: I'm Luca, founder of BeGift. Your answers come straight to me — max 3 minutes, and they help me decide how BeGift evolves over the next months.
survey.footer_privacy: 🔒 Your answers are only used to improve BeGift. Email is optional, only if you want a follow-up.
survey.error_network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
survey.occasion_no_reason: Just a thought, no specific reason
survey.q_experience_rating: How much did you enjoy creating the gift?
survey.q_liked_most: What's the first thing you liked?
survey.q_frustrated: What's the first thing that frustrated or confused you?
survey.q_would_add: What would you add that isn't there today?
survey.ph_would_add: A feature you wished you had...
survey.q_recipient_feedback: What did the person who received the gift say or write?
survey.ph_recipient_feedback: Even one sentence. If they said nothing, just skip.
survey.q_would_pay: Would you pay to use BeGift?
survey.pay_yes_worth_it: Yes, it seems worth the price
survey.pay_yes_low: Yes, but only at a low price
survey.pay_maybe: Maybe, depends on price and features
survey.pay_no_free: No, I'd want it free forever
survey.vw_intro: 🧮 Four pricing questions (Van Westendorp). Indicate a price in €/year. Even zero is fine if that's your gut answer.
survey.q_price_too_expensive: At what price would you think "too expensive, I wouldn't use it"?
survey.q_price_expensive_but_worth: At what price would you think "expensive, but maybe worth it"?
survey.q_price_good_deal: At what price would you think "good deal"?
survey.q_price_too_cheap: At what price would you think "too cheap, I'd doubt the quality"?
survey.q_preferred_pricing: Which pricing formula would you pay for most willingly?
survey.pricing_per_gift: Single payment per gift (e.g. €1 each gift)
survey.pricing_premium: Premium packaging (animations, unique palettes) as in-app purchase
survey.voucher_intro: We're considering a feature: instead of creating a gift from scratch, you could forward a purchase email to BeGift (a voucher, a ticket, an experience) and BeGift wraps it automatically.
survey.q_voucher_interest: Have you ever thought about turning a voucher, ticket or experience you bought online into a gift?
survey.voucher_very_useful: Yes, that would be super useful
survey.voucher_never_thought: I had never thought about this
survey.q_online_sites: If you buy gifts online, from which sites typically?
survey.q_nps: From 0 to 10, how likely are you to recommend BeGift to a friend?
survey.section5_intro: All of these are optional. If you'd rather not answer anything, that's fine — just hit "Submit survey" below.
survey.q_call: Would you like me to call you for a short chat (10 minutes)?

survey_thanks.title: Truly, thank you.
survey_thanks.line1: Your answers come straight to me — Luca, founder of BeGift.
survey_thanks.line2: Every piece of feedback at this launch stage is worth ten times more than feedback in six months. I'll read them all.

settings_reminders.title: 🔔 Reminders
settings_reminders.description: Add birthdays and anniversaries for the people that matter. We'll send a notification N days before so you have time to prepare a gift.
settings_reminders.needs_login_title: Sign in to manage your reminders
settings_reminders.needs_login_subtitle: We'll send you a notification when an important birthday is coming up.
settings_reminders.empty: No reminders yet. Add one above so you never forget a birthday again.

settings_notif_test.title: Notifications test
settings_notif_test.subtitle: Verify that push notifications actually arrive. If something doesn't work, this is where you find out.
settings_notif_test.needs_login: Sign in to use this page
settings_notif_test.hint_perm_default: You haven't given permission yet. Go to dashboard and turn on notifications from the card you'll see there.
settings_notif_test.hint_perm_denied: Permission was denied. To re-enable: in your browser settings, on the begift.app page, unblock notifications.
settings_notif_test.hint_perm_unsupported: Your browser does not support push notifications.
settings_notif_test.hint_pwa_not_installed: On iPhone, push notifications only work if BeGift is installed as an app (icon on the Home screen). Open this site in Safari, tap the share icon, then "Add to Home Screen". On Android, push works even without installation.
settings_notif_test.hint_anomalous: Anomalous state: your browser says notifications are authorized, but the server has no device registered for you. This happens after a system update or if the subscription was invalidated. Tap below to reconnect without re-authorizing.
settings_notif_test.hint_no_devices: No device registered. This means your browser hasn't (yet) subscribed to push. Go to dashboard and turn it on from the "Notifications" card.
settings_notif_test.duplicates_warning: You have {count} subscriptions registered. Probably accumulated duplicates (happens after iOS updates).
settings_notif_test.cleanup_confirm: Delete ALL existing subscriptions and create a single fresh one?
settings_notif_test.cleanup_success: ✓ Full reset: deleted {deleted}, created 1 fresh subscription.
settings_notif_test.cleanup_partial: Deleted {deleted}, but I couldn't create a new one: {reason}
settings_notif_test.hint_pending: You have notifications you haven't read. If the original push didn't arrive (it can happen), you'll find them all here.
settings_notif_test.hint_send_test: If permission is on and at least one device is registered, you should receive a push right away.
settings_notif_test.test_no_devices: No notification sent. Verify you've authorized notifications in your browser.
settings_notif_test.test_sent_one: ✓ Sent to {n} device. You should see it in a few seconds.
settings_notif_test.test_sent_many: ✓ Sent to {n} devices. You should see it in a few seconds.
settings_notif_test.reconnect_success: ✓ Subscription {action}. Tap "Send me a notification" below to test.
settings_notif_test.reconnect_err_unsupported: Your browser does not support push notifications.
settings_notif_test.reconnect_err_permission: You first need to authorize notifications in your browser.
settings_notif_test.reconnect_err_save_failed: Network error while saving. Try again.
settings_notif_test.reconnect_err_subscribe_failed: Error connecting to push service. Try again.
settings_notif_test.reconnect_err_auth: Session expired — reload the page and try again.

festa_mamma.hero_subtitle: Five emotional questions, one photo, your song. BeGift wraps them into a gift mom opens from her phone, on May 11th.
festa_mamma.hero_meta: ⏱ Ready in 3 minutes · 🆓 Free · 💌 No app for mom to install
festa_mamma.section2_subtitle: Not a generic card. A portrait of mom through what she gave you.
festa_mamma.step1_desc: Strong, gentle, patient, witty, home. Just one. It becomes the big title of the opened gift.
festa_mamma.step2_desc: It doesn't have to be important. Even just a scent, a phrase, an afternoon.
festa_mamma.step3_title: A photo of you two that you love
festa_mamma.step3_desc: It becomes a slightly rotated polaroid, with paper tape. Vintage photo effect.
festa_mamma.step4_title: What she taught you without saying it
festa_mamma.step4_desc: One sentence. Like "that people are measured by how they treat waiters".
festa_mamma.step5_desc: Spotify or YouTube link. It becomes a player inside the gift mom can listen to.
festa_mamma.step_plus_desc: Dinner, spa, book, show tickets. Upload a PDF or paste the link. Turn the gift into something practical too.
festa_mamma.preview_subtitle: She opens the link from her phone. The pink package unwraps slowly with music. Then she sees your word, the polaroid, your sentences, your song.
festa_mamma.preview_memory_example: "My sharpest memory with you is that August afternoon on the terrace, peaches sliced in the blue plate."
festa_mamma.final_title: Mom deserves more than a text
festa_mamma.final_subtitle: We hold your hand: five questions, she gets a gift she'll remember.

seasonal_banner.mothers_day_subline: Create the Letter that grows: 5 emotional questions, a photo, a song. Ready in 3 minutes.
seasonal_banner.fathers_day_subline: A Letter that grows for dad: 5 questions, a photo, a song. Ready in 3 minutes.

settings_hub.title: ⚙️ Settings
settings_hub.subtitle: Manage profile, notifications, reminders and preferences.
settings_hub.push_unsupported: Your browser does not support push notifications.
settings_hub.push_denied: Notifications are blocked. Enable them in your browser settings for BeGift.
settings_hub.push_default_intro: You haven't given push notifications permission yet. Turn them on to get notified when something important happens.
settings_hub.push_privacy_note: We only use notifications to alert you about gifts received, openings of your gifts and reactions. You can revoke consent at any time from your browser settings or from this page. Details in the
settings_hub.toggle_reaction: When someone reacts to my gift
settings_hub.reminders_empty: Add birthdays and anniversaries to get a reminder when they're coming up.
settings_hub.install_done: ✓ BeGift is installed on your device
settings_hub.install_intro: Install BeGift as an app on your device for a faster experience and to receive notifications.
settings_hub.delete_intro: You can delete your account at any time (right to erasure, GDPR art. 17). All your gifts, reminders, preferences and personal data will be wiped. This action is irreversible.
settings_hub.logout_confirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?
settings_hub.delete_confirm_1: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action is irreversible and wipes all your data.
settings_hub.delete_success: Account deleted. You will be redirected to the home page.
settings_hub.delete_failed: Deletion error. Try again or contact privacy@begift.app.
settings_hub.export_failed: Export error. Try again or contact privacy@begift.app.

festa_papa.hero_subtitle: Five emotional questions, one photo, your song. BeGift wraps them into a gift dad opens from his phone, on June 19th.
festa_papa.hero_meta: ⏱ Ready in 3 minutes · 🆓 Free · 💌 No app for dad to install
festa_papa.section2_subtitle: Not a generic card. A portrait of dad through what he gave you.
festa_papa.step1_desc: Rock, north star, quiet, captain. Just one. It becomes the big title of the opened gift.
festa_papa.step2_desc: Even just a gesture, a road trip, a silent morning.
festa_papa.step3_title: A photo of you two that you love
festa_papa.step3_desc: It becomes a slightly rotated polaroid, with paper tape. Vintage photo effect.
festa_papa.step4_title: What he taught you without saying it
festa_papa.step4_desc: One sentence that captures a silent inheritance.
festa_papa.step5_desc: Spotify or YouTube link. It becomes a player inside the gift dad can listen to.
festa_papa.step_plus_desc: Dinner, wine, book, show tickets. Upload a PDF or paste the link.
festa_papa.final_title: Dad never asks for anything. You can think of him though.
festa_papa.final_subtitle: We hold your hand: five questions, he gets a gift he'll remember.

parent_letter.draft_resume_title: 📝 You have a gift in progress
parent_letter.step0_hint_name: It will appear in the gift's dedication. You can also use nicknames.
parent_letter.step0_hint_sender: If you leave it empty we'll use your username.
parent_letter.step1_hint: Just one word. It will become the big title of the opened gift.
parent_letter.step3_upload_medium: On a slow connection it can take a moment — don't close the page.
parent_letter.step3_upload_slow: This seems very slow. If it doesn't start in a few seconds, try a smaller photo or reload.
parent_letter.step3_choose_hint: A photo of the two of you. It will become a slightly rotated polaroid.
parent_letter.step4_hint: What you learned from {pronoun} {parent} without them saying it explicitly. Just one sentence.
parent_letter.step5_song_hint: Search the song by title or artist — find it and that's it. It becomes a player inside the gift.
parent_letter.step6_voucher_hint: Dinner, experience, tickets. Turn the emotional gift into something practical too.
parent_letter.step6_voucher_skip: You can also skip this step: the emotional gift works perfectly on its own.
parent_letter.preview_intro: Preview of what will be seen by
parent_letter.step2_hint: It doesn't have to be an important memory. Even just a scent, a phrase, an afternoon.
parent_letter.err_maintenance: BeGift is under maintenance. Try again in a few minutes.
parent_letter.err_rate_limit: You've reached the limit of 20 gifts per day. Try again tomorrow.
parent_letter.err_network: Network error: {msg}. Check your connection and try again.
parent_letter.fallback_warning: Gift created. Note: the special template rendering may not be available on this environment — the recipient will see a standard gift.
